title: BBL Flight Blocks
description: Add a block that grants flight in an area when palced
body:
# __**Flight Blocks**__

## __**Overview**__

A simple mod that simply adds a Flight Block which when placed in world give the player flight within a range of the block. The block shows its range on right click and can have a configurable range 

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
